title: KeProfiles
description: Do you use different keybinds for different game modes like CPVP, SMP, or Parkour? Are you tired of manually changing controls in the settings menu every time? KeProfiles is the solution!
body:
# KeProfiles

**Stop wasting time in the settings menu!**

KeProfiles is a lightweight utility mod designed for players who play multiple game modes like **CPVP (Crystal PvP)**, **SMP (Survival)**, **Parkour**, or **Speedrunning**.

It allows you to save your current keybind configuration as a "profile" and switch between them instantly using simple in-game commands. No more manually re-binding your keys every time you switch servers!

## ✨ Features

* **🔗 Auto-Server Switching (New!):** Link profiles to specific server IPs! Your controls automatically change when you join a server (e.g., Skyblock vs. PvP).
* **📡 Export & Import (New!):** Share your setups easily! Copy your entire profile to your clipboard as a code or import one from a friend.
* **🛠️ Smart Editing (New!):** Swap keys instantly (`/kb swap`) or update your active profile (`/kb update`) on the fly without re-typing names.
* **⚡ Instant Switching:** Switch your entire control scheme in milliseconds via commands.
* **📂 Unlimited Profiles:** Create as many profiles as you need (e.g., `cpvp`, `smp`, `creative`, `stream`).
* **🚀 Lightweight:** Zero impact on FPS or performance. Client-side only.
* **✅ Easy to Use:** Simple and intuitive command structure.

## 🎮 Commands

* `/kb save <name>`
    * Saves your current keybinds to a new profile.
    * *Example:* `/kb save cpvp`

* `/kb load <name>`
    * Instantly loads the specified profile and updates your controls.
    * *Example:* `/kb load smp`
  
* `/kb delete <name>`
    * Deletes a saved profile.
    * *Example:* `/kb delete old_settings`
  
* `/kb list`
  * Lists all currently saved profiles.
  * *Example:* `/kb list`

* `/kb export <profileName>`
  * Copies the specified profile configuration to your clipboard as a code.
  * *Example:* `/kb export pvp_v1`

* `/kb import clipboard <newName>`
  * Creates a new profile using the code currently in your clipboard.
  * *Example:* `/kb import clipboard best_pvp_settings`

* `/kb update`
  * Overwrites the **currently active** profile with your current keybinds.
  * *Example:* `/kb update`

* `/kb swap <key1> <key2> [save]`
  * Instantly swaps two keys. Add `save` to make it permanent for the active profile.
  * *Example:* `/kb swap Q G` (Temporary)
  * *Example:* `/kb swap Q G save` (Permanent)

* `/kb link <profileName>`
  * Binds a profile to the server IP you are currently playing on.
  * *Example:* `/kb link skyblock_profile`

* `/kb unlink`
  * Removes the auto-load binding for the current server.
  * *Example:* `/kb unlink`

## 📦 Installation

1.  Download the `.jar` file.
2.  Place it in your `.minecraft/mods` folder.
3.  Ensure you have **Fabric API** installed.
4.  Launch the game and enjoy!

---
*Developed by Mekoke.*
